title: Applicability Scope
description: Defines which OS, version range, platform, and ASIC family a data point applies to. Appears on every operational data point in the TSH datastore.

min.description: Minimum version (inclusive). Use '*' for all versions.

max.description: Maximum version (inclusive). Use '*' for no upper bound.

os.description: Operating system identifier. Use '*' for truly universal commands.

versions.description: Specific non-contiguous versions. Use instead of version_range for caveats that affect scattered versions.

platforms.description: Platform families this applies to. null = all platforms for this OS.
